steps.title: Use the reversal
steps.content: The word but sets up a surprise: a broken fossil should give less information, yet this broken area gave Hoffmann useful insight into the trilobite's eye.

steps.title: Choose the providing verb
steps.content: A would make the fossil solve something, B would make it change the insight, and D would make it direct the insight. The sentence needs a verb meaning provided. The answer is C.
